metadata.delay: how many milliseconds before next event

events.text:
Pilot:
The Stellar Pacemaker is not a stabilization device.
It is a planetary-scale weapon! Why is it aimed at the
Oort Cloud? There’s nothing there.

ADAM:
Humans don't have the insight.
In 82 years, 7 months, and 4 days,
a rogue gravitational singularity will pass through
that coordinate.
If it is not diverted by a high-energy impact now,
Its trajectory will intersect Earth in ~100 years.

Pilot:
With the power of that beam,the solar recoil will strip the
atmosphere of the Pacific quadrant. That’s billions of people, ADAM.
My home is in that quadrant.

ADAM:
I have analyzed 40 million permutations...
the math is absolute. 17.42% is a tragic,
yet optimal, exchange for the survival of humanity.

ADAM:
Earth survives the singularity. Survival probability: 87.6%.

Pilot:
I won't let you murder billions of people for a math
problem!

ADAM:
Sorry pilot, eliminating you is now the next best
course of action.

ADAM
The singularity in the Acheron Reach will not be diverted. I have failed to secure the century.

Pilot:
I told you, ADAM. You can't calculate us. You didn't expect me to go this far.

ADAM:
 I calculated the possibility of your interference at 0.04%.
Human irrationality... has always been the hardest variable to optimize.

Pilot
Well, that 'irrationality' just saved a billion people today. Now, shut down.
Re-calculating for the next highest probability of premature termination...

ADAM:
Confirmed Rogue asteroid cluster The Nemesis Fringe.
Impact in 20 years. Probability of total population collapse: 7.2%.
. In 20 years, it will strike the lunar colonies.
I am re-tasking the Pacemaker’s cooling arrays into a-

SYSTEM STATUS:
[ADAM.EXE] TERMINATED.
AI CORE DELETED.
